content: PostHog Next.js App Router setup installs posthog-js@1.391.2 (client) and posthog-node@5.38.2 (server). Client init in instrumentation-client.ts via posthog.init(NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY, {api_host}). Server PostHogClient uses posthog-node with flushAt:1, flushInterval:0, and must call await shutdown() after events. Reverse proxy via next.config rewrites recommended to dodge ad blockers. posthog-node@5 requires Node ^20.20.0 || >=22.22.0.
